scripts.dev:all: node -e "const {spawn}=require('child_process'); const procs=[['npm',['run','dev']],['npm',['run','worker']]]; const children=procs.map(([cmd,args])=>spawn(cmd,args,{stdio:'inherit',shell:true})); const shutdown=()=>children.forEach(c=>{try{c.kill('SIGINT')}catch{}}); process.on('SIGINT',()=>{shutdown(); process.exit(130)}); children.forEach((c,i)=>c.on('exit',(code)=>{if(code&&code!==0){shutdown(); process.exit(code)} if(i===0){} }));"
